changes: Add biome discovery modal with banner images that appears when discovering new biomes
Add depth filter to dependency graph focus mode—limit traversal to 1-10 steps from a focused node to see just the next few unlocks without the full tree
Add new 'Comb Rock Pools' action for Rocky Shore that gives 35% chance for crabs and 15% chance for fish
Add new 'Rock Pool Cache' building that provides +3 storage for fish, crabs, and shells
Apply all Fishing skill milestones to both Wade Tidal Pool and Comb Rock Pools actions
Fix expedition progress bar to show only undiscovered biomes for the current expedition instead of all undiscovered biomes globally
Fix mobile modal display issue where taps during animation could dismiss modals before they become visible
Fix modal rendering layering issues on Chrome Android by rendering modals inline instead of in a separate portal
Improve Spear Fishing: now has 15% chance to catch large fish and 15% chance to catch crabs, plus 10% faster action speed at Fishing level 8
Remove building toast notifications — settlement panel already displays new buildings clearly
Replace small text toast notifications with full-screen modal showing biome name, banner image, and discovery flavor text
Add collapsible stash section to resource panel for organizing items when inventory exceeds 15 items
Add encouraging messages when discovering the Bamboo Grove and building the Camp Fire
Add grid view toggle to inventory panel for compact icon-only display
Improve early game food production pacing with stronger early fishing bonuses
Increase Fishing Level 2 milestone: now grants +5% crab chance (previously +2% fish and crab)
Increase Fishing Level 3 milestone: now grants +10% fish chance (previously +2% fish and crab)
Move tools section below items in inventory (tools don't change often)
Save inventory view preference (list/grid) to local storage
Show building discovery notifications in toast alerts alongside biome discoveries
Action cards where all outputs are full now show an amber border and reduced opacity to help you quickly identify which actions are worth clicking
Add direction and feature feedback questions that appear after players have answered 3+ survey responses, cycling between early, late, and direction question pools
Add item source information in inventory (shows which actions, recipes, stations, or expeditions produce each resource)
Display currently training skill with level and XP progress while performing actions
Fix bug where crop stations could exceed plot limits by counting each crop type separately instead of sharing plot slots
Fix expedition loop running one extra cycle after discovering the last biome
Fix progress bar showing incorrect craft count when using substitute resources
Fix search panel to display correct icons for resources and buildings in search results
Make inventory items tap-to-expand to show detailed information
Remove the 'Stop if full' toggle button from the action interface
Replace FULL badge with mini storage bars showing current amount/limit for each drop
Replace small biome icons with panoramic banner headers in the gather tab for a more immersive visual experience
Show count of undiscovered biomes remaining during expeditions
Show storage status on gather action cards: individual resource drops now display a 'FULL' badge and dim when at storage cap
Show tool prerequisites on locked actions and recipes instead of hiding them completely
Sort ready-to-collect stations to the top of the active stations list, with in-progress stations sorted by time remaining
Stop-when-full is now always enforced — actions automatically stop when output storage is full, preventing unproductive grinding
Storage bars now turn amber at 80%+ capacity and display amber text when full for better at-a-glance inventory status
Add 'Give feedback' button in settings menu to manually trigger feedback modal
Add Cinzel serif display font to game title, chapter names, and victory screen for a more adventurous feel
Add collection flyup animation when gathering resources from stations
Add dev tool to reset feedback modal state for testing purposes
Add new Charcoal Board building that grants +1 routine slot — craft it from 2 driftwood + 1 charcoal
Add reset confirmation dialog requiring user to type 'RESET' to confirm dangerous actions
Add subtle crossfade transition when switching between tabs
Add support for prefers-reduced-motion accessibility setting
Add unified button variants (primary, secondary, ghost, danger) for UI consistency
Adjust Construction skill requirements for various recipes: Well now requires Lv5 (was Lv6), Hammock requires Lv7 (was Lv8), and other recipes shifted down accordingly
Change search button from text label to magnifying glass icon
Compress Construction skill tree: skill now caps at level 15 instead of 17
Convert settings dropdown to a full modal with organized sections
Fix alternate crafting resources showing as available before being discovered by the player
Fix bug where stone_flake appeared useless after crafting stone_blade, blocking access to gorge hook progression
Fix feedback modal not displaying correctly on mobile devices
Fix feedback question modal on mobile to prevent accidental dismissal during touch scrolling
Fix tab bar overflow on mobile by moving Inventory and Skills tabs to a dropdown menu
Fix win screen re-appearing after dismissing it and reloading the page
Improve feedback modal visibility and usability on small screens by preventing background page scrolling when modal is open
Improve mobile UI layout by keeping frequently-used tabs visible and hiding less-used tabs behind a 'More' menu
Improve typography with Inter body font for cleaner, more polished text
Increase XP rewards from one-time construction builds by ~25-30% (sleeping mat, hammock, stone hearth, palm leaf pile)
Increase food cost for 'Sail to Nearby Island' expedition from 3 to 7 per trip
Lower starting morale from 100 to 55, giving players more room to improve morale through gameplay
Move search button from header to tab bar area for better discoverability
Move the +1 routine slot bonus from Charcoal Kiln to the new Charcoal Board building
Reduce food cost for 'Explore Along the Beach' expedition from 5 to 4 per trip
Reduce food cost for 'Explore Island Interior' expedition from 8 to 6 per trip
Remove Construction Lv9 'Efficient builder' milestone — construction speed bonus no longer available
Replace all close buttons with consistent SVG CloseIcon component
Update section headers from uppercase to sentence-case with bolder weight for a warmer aesthetic
Add Routines automation feature - chain multiple gather/craft actions into repeating sequences
Add Stone Tidal Weir building — a mid-game passive fishing station unlocked at Fishing level 11
Add Tidal Weir station that yields bulk fish, crabs, and shells every 8 minutes once the Stone Tidal Weir is built
Add feedback question modal that appears after idle gameplay
Add flow arrows between routine steps for clearer visualization
Charcoal Kiln building upgrade unlocks +1 routine slot
Create custom routines with 2+ steps that automatically advance through gather or craft actions
Display which resources share storage with current item in crafting panel
Display which resources share storage with current item in inventory panel
Expand fishing progression with new tier at Fishing level 11
Feedback answers are submitted anonymously to help improve the game
Feedback prompts have a 5-day cooldown between asks; dismiss 3 times to pause for 30 days
Fix Drop Line Fishing action no longer requiring Fishing level 8 — the gorge_hook tool requirement provides sufficient gating
Fix feedback question modal display on mobile by rendering inline instead of using portal
Fix feedback question modal positioning on mobile devices — now stays centered in viewport regardless of scroll
Fix modal disappearing when scrolling on mobile devices
Fix modal dismissal on mobile by improving tap detection to ignore scroll gestures
Fix routine loop symbol display (was broken HTML entity)
Fix station UI not showing correct costs when milestone upgrades reduce setup requirements
Gather steps auto-stop when output is full to allow routine progression
Improve feedback question trigger to use simpler 15-second timer instead of activity detection
Manual action changes cancel the active routine
Minimize feedback modal to a floating button to answer later without interrupting gameplay
Outrigger Canoe building upgrade enables +2 steps per routine
Prevent crafting when output storage is full to avoid wasting inputs
Redesign routine cards to match action card layout with better visual hierarchy
Routines unlock when any skill reaches level 15
Show 'Storage full' warning on recipe cards when output storage is at capacity
Show actual resource icons for each routine step instead of generic icons
Simplify feedback question modal dismissal to use standard click detection like other modals
Soaking Pit building now only appears after you've processed pandanus the basic way, creating a clearer upgrade path
Stations no longer appear in the available list until you've discovered the resources needed for their setup (e.g., Grow Pandanus won't show until you find a pandanus_cutting)
Storage Shelf building upgrade enables step counts and +1 step per routine
Add 'Continue Playing' button to victory screen to dismiss the overlay and keep playing after completing the game
Add Charcoal Kiln building — convert 3 large logs into 15 charcoal over 10 minutes for bulk fuel production
Add Charcoal resource as alternative fuel for cooking and clay firing recipes
Add Clay Storage Jar building: +1 food storage per jar, stackable up to 5 (requires Firing Pit)
Add Cooking 7 milestone: Quick cook — all cooking 10% faster
Add Crafting 7 milestone: Efficient craftsman — all crafting 10% faster
Add Farming 6 milestone: Practiced farmer — all farming 10% faster
Add Fishing 7 milestone: Practiced angler — all fishing 10% faster
Add Foraging 8 milestone: Seasoned forager — all foraging 10% faster
Add Log Rack building: +10 storage for large items (requires Fenced Perimeter)
Add Pottery Wheel building: halves clay pot shaping time
Add Soaking Pit building: passively soak pandanus leaves into retted pandanus for better fiber yield
Add Storage Shelf building (Construction 17) — +5 general item storage and +10 food storage
Add Weaving 8 milestone: Deft weaver — all weaving 10% faster
Add Woodworking 6 milestone: Practiced woodworker — all woodworking 10% faster
Add Woodworking Lv12 milestone — fell large trees 15% faster
Add migration banner on old .pages.dev domain with 'Move my save' button to transfer your save to seabound.dev
Add missing dry grass kindling requirement to several cooking recipes for consistency
Add new Crafting 12 milestone: Batch firing — 20% chance to double fired clay pot output
Add new Crafting 5 milestone: Efficient strips — 25% chance for double pandanus strips
Add new Crafting 9 milestone: Clay wedging — pots no longer crack during firing (15% success bonus)
Add new Weaving 10 milestone: Rope walk — twist rope 20% faster
Add new chapter banner image for the Voyage phase
Add new recipe: Kiln-fire pots (faster, more fuel-efficient kiln variant)
Add new recipe: Wheel-throw clay pots via pottery wheel
Add new resource: Retted Pandanus (soaked fiber that yields more strips when split)
Add pottery breakage mechanic — reduce cracking risk through clay wedging milestone
Add recipes now accept alternate resources — charcoal can replace driftwood in most fire-based crafting
Add victory screen image with golden glow effect
Allow Grow Pandanus station on any plot type, not just farm plots
Auto-import saves when visiting seabound.dev with migration data in the URL
Fenced Perimeter now provides +5 storage for large items
Fired clay pots and fresh water now share a combined storage cap — you can't exceed the pot limit by filling them
Fix Charcoal Kiln storage bonus to only affect charcoal (was incorrectly giving +20 to all storage)
Fix auto-stop not triggering when doing actions with only chance-based drops (like Comb Rocky Shore)
Fix basket trap no longer appearing in Deploy section when already deployed
Fix bug where fully-deployed stations (like Soak Pandanus) remained visible in the Deploy section instead of being hidden
Fix confusing UI by hiding the Pandanus Grove harvest station from the Deploy section when all production slots are already active
Fix duplicate biome discovery toasts appearing after page reload
Fix harvest_pandanus_grove requiring Farming Lv12 — now requires Lv8 to match grow_pandanus station
Fix recipes incorrectly reappearing after upgrading buildings (e.g. char_log_interior and scrape_hull would show again after upgrading dugout to outrigger)
Fix recipes with useless output now properly hiding after all downstream recipes are crafted
Fix sail recipe to craft only once (like other boat upgrade components)
Fixed storage cap checks in inventory and resource panels to account for shared storage groups
Fresh water no longer triggers the 'sink chance' when filling pots (prevents wasting water due to randomness)
Hide 'Fell Large Tree' action once you've obtained the large log needed for the dugout canoe
Improve Crafting Panel UI to display alternate resource options with 'or' separator
Improve journal display by converting it to a centered modal overlay with backdrop blur for better visibility and consistency with other UI elements
Improve tab bar visual layout with stacked icon and label design on mobile
Improve visual clarity of existing resource and building icons across the game
Increase XP gains from all farming stations to better match fishing rewards
Increase sail to far island food cost from 5 to 10
Increase sail to nearby island food cost from 3 to 10
Increase tab icon size to 24px for better visibility
Lower Taro cultivation requirement from Farming Lv5 to Lv3
Move Farming Lv7 gate to building the Pandanus Grove instead of planting pandanus
Remove Cooking level 12 requirement from Sealed Clay Jar recipe — now craftable as soon as you have a Firing Pit
Remove large log from dugout voyage expedition rewards
Remove one-time limitation from large tree felling action
Remove weaving level requirement from sail recipe — now only requires fiber loom
Remove well building requirement for Grow Pandanus station
Rename Chapter 5 from "Escape" to "Voyage" with updated tagline
Replace emoji tab icons with custom game icons for Gather, Inventory, Craft, Skills, and Tend tabs
Show locked stations in Tend tab when you have the seed/cutting but not the required skill level
Show which buildings provide slots for crop stations (e.g., 'Uses: Cleared Plot, Tended Garden')
Soaking pit now grants +5 storage bonus for pandanus resources
Storage Shelf requires bamboo cane, fired clay pots, and cordage to build
Thatched Hut now provides +5 food storage
Add 'Escape' phase triggered by building the outrigger canoe
Add 'Fit Outrigger & Sail' recipe: requires sail + 3 rope + 6 bamboo (Construction 8)
Add 'Oceanic Voyage' expedition: final journey requiring outrigger canoe and 10 voyage provisions
Add Outrigger Canoe building as the final vessel upgrade from dugout
Add Search button in header that opens a searchable modal overlay with relevance-ranked results
Add global search feature to find actions, recipes, stations, and expeditions by name, inputs, or outputs
Add hover hint to morale chip indicating it can be clicked for details
Add new 'Tend' tab (🌱) for managing stations like fish traps and crop plots, separate from building construction
Add quick-start buttons in search results to immediately begin actions or jump to relevant tabs
Add victory screen displaying total skill levels, biomes discovered, and buildings built
Auto-redeploy stations like basket traps and pandanus groves after collection, eliminating the extra click to set them again
Dugout voyages now return empty fired clay pots (85% chance per pot) as rewards
Fix bug where base building recipes would reappear after upgrading to a higher-tier building (e.g., sleeping mat recipe showing again after building hammock)
Fix farmland recipes being incorrectly blocked when the farmland group is at max capacity
Fix farmland upgrade chain (Cleared Plot → Tended Garden → Farm Plot) now correctly shares a combined limit of 3 total farmland instead of allowing 9
Fix incorrect comment for Kiln recipe (was Construction 25)
Improve morale tooltip with expanded panel showing speed effects, decay rate, restoration methods, and comfort building status
Increase Kiln building requirement from Construction 10 to Construction 13
Oceanic voyage now returns empty fired clay pots and sealed clay jars on completion
Remove direct water collection action — fresh water now requires building a well and using the "Fill Water Pot" recipe
Rename 'Voyage by Dugout' expedition to 'Sail to Far Island'
Station ready-to-collect notifications now direct you to the Tend tab instead of Build tab
Stations panel moved from Build tab to dedicated Tend tab for better organization
Add Grow Pandanus farming action requiring Farming level 8
Add Pandanus Cutting resource obtainable from Dugout Voyages
Add Pandanus Fiber system as a mid-game upgrade path alternative to coconut husk
Add Pandanus Grove building that auto-regrows pandanus leaves for harvesting
Add Pandanus fiber processing recipes: dry leaves, cut strips, weave cordage, twist rope, and sew sails
Add Rope and Sail resources crafted from pandanus fibers
Add farming skill milestone bonuses for Grow Pandanus and Harvest Pandanus Grove actions
Add pity system for biome discovery expeditions — failed discovery attempts gradually increase chances of finding new biomes, reducing extremely long discovery droughts
Add skill milestones for Construction: speed up all construction recipes
Add skill milestones for Cooking: cook fish faster, occasionally double cooked root vegetables, speed up all cooking, and pack provisions faster
Add skill milestones for Crafting: shape clay pots faster and speed up all crafting recipes
Add skill milestones for Farming: plant wild seeds faster
Add skill milestones for Foraging: gather coconuts faster, improve flat stone chances, and find extra driftwood
Add skill milestones for Navigation: discover new biomes more easily, speed up expeditions, and get better drops
Add skill milestones for Weaving: speed up all weaving recipes
Add skill milestones for Woodworking: harvest bamboo faster
Add three-tier comfort building system: Sleeping Mat, Hammock, and Thatched Hut that progressively slow morale decay during active play (20%, 35%, and 50% respectively)
Buildings can now provide bonuses to the max count of other stackable buildings
Ensure players can always fill storage with "stop at full" before penalty takes effect
Fenced Perimeter now grants +5 max woven baskets (increases capacity from 20 to 25)
Fix XP diminishing returns to scale with storage capacity expansions
Fix crafting recipe durations to now benefit from skill milestones (previously only gathering actions got this bonus)
Fix expedition durations to now benefit from skill milestones (previously only gathering actions got this bonus)
Fix farming seeds and corms being incorrectly filtered from action drops
Remove Construction skill requirement from Dugout assembly — now only gated by the tree-felling chain
Show morale gain on Maintain Camp recipe in the Settlement panel, including soft cap warning when morale is above 100
